description: Set of three pairs of socks in blackSlip your feet into cosy comfort and up your running speed with ease in this set of three socks in black from nike. Engineered with arch support and offering a secure stable Fit, this set offers exemplary comfort.  Crew length socks made of 77% cotton, 22% nylon and 1% spandexHas a half cushion terry foot for exemplary comfort and shock absorptionInner arch support for a secure and stable fitCareMachine wash cold at 30 degreesUse a non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowDo not iron or dry clean
